3198400.name: Cat Tree
3198400.description:
Cat Tree is a relaxing and captivating indie game where you can collect adorable cats that inhabit a mysterious tree. Starting with just a few cats, you'll watch as your tree grows, revealing new sections with fresh spots for your charming pets.
Discover a variety of cats hiding in each container!
You'll find everything from common to the most unique ones. Collect them all to expand your collection.
Your task is to nurture the cats, watch them grow, and decide which ones to keep in your collection and which to sell for profit. Explore the tree and uncover all its secrets while enjoying the peaceful and soothing atmosphere of the game.
3198400.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语*, 意大利语*, 德语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*, 保加利亚语*, 越南语*, 希腊语*, 丹麦语*, 简体中文*, 繁体中文*, 韩语*, 挪威语*, 荷兰语*, 波兰语*, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙*, 俄语*, 罗马尼亚语*, 泰语*, 土耳其语*, 匈牙利语*, 乌克兰语*, 芬兰语*, 捷克语*, 瑞典语*, 日语*, 印度尼西亚语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
